description: Beyond the Veil Patch 11 (5 July 2023) — Hide Casting/Channeling Bars, General Changes, Combat Balance Changes (Arcane Staffs, Bows, Crossbows, Maces, Swords, Quarterstaffs, Spears, Helmets, Armors, Shoes, Battlemounts, Miscellaneous, Knightfall Abbey), General Fixes.

sections.heading: Hide Casting and Channeling Bars
sections.description: Added option to hide casting and channeling bars of other players during crowded fights. Can be set for allied players, enemy players, or both in Settings → Interface.
sections.searchable_text: Hide Casting Channeling Bars allied enemy players Settings Interface

sections.heading: General Changes and Improvements
items: [Mobile] Login interface now supports autofill via Password Managers

Faction Warfare: When a zone becomes a backline, all Outposts now automatically change ownership to the zone owner; an attacking Faction cut off can no longer progress zone capture even holding majority Outposts
Crystal Arena / 5v5 Crystal League match duration: 25 minutes → 24 minutes
Guild Finder now accepts custom Discord links
Added avatars for Mists chests
sections.searchable_text: Mobile Login autofill Password Manager Faction Warfare backline Outposts zone owner cut off Crystal Arena 5v5 Crystal League match duration 25 24 minutes Guild Finder Discord Mists chests avatars

sections.heading: Selectable Nametag Changes and Fixes
items: Removed default box around off-screen nametags — now only shown on mouseover or when target is selected
Off-screen nametags now always have some transparency
Fixed issue where right-clicking nametag selected player (now only activated by left click)
Fixed issue where skillshots could not be cast when clicking on player nametag
sections.searchable_text: Nametag off-screen box mouseover transparency right-click left click skillshots

sections.heading: Controller Changes and Fixes
items: Items moved via controller now stack by default
Text fields no longer default to input mode when navigated to via controller; added 'Input Text' interaction and confirm hint
Fixed issue where it was not possible to interact with the Fort Sterling Marketplace while using a controller
Fixed issue where 'Quick Cast on Button Release' did not work with control scheme 'Right stick cursor'
Fixed issue where pressing button while walking would spam ground clicks and character would keep moving
sections.searchable_text: Controller items stack text fields input mode Fort Sterling Marketplace Quick Cast Button Release Right stick cursor walking ground clicks

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Arcane Staffs Arcane Orb Void Malevolent Locus Bows Enchanted Quiver Magic Arrow Warbow Crossbows Explosive Bolt Vicious Barrage Siegebow Maces Battle Howl Heavy Mace Swords Iron Will Parry Strike Quarterstaffs Fatal Blade Black Monk Staff Spears Impaler Spear Throw Heron Spear Helmets Block Soldier Helmet Electric Discharge Judicator Retaliate Hunter Hood Stone Skin Armors Life Steal Aura Hellion Jacket Shoes Crush Charge Duskweaver Dodge Energetic Sprint Cloth Sandals Rejuvenating Sprint Plate Boots Battlemounts Crystal Beam Roving Bastion Miscellaneous Cooldown Spell Change Equipment Cancel Toggle Channel Knightfall Abbey Blessing of Compassion

subsections.heading: Arcane Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Arcane Staffs Arcane Orb One-handed Purge before silence Void Malevolent Locus Cleanse logic reverted tick interval

changes.raw_text: Arcane Orb: Purge now triggers before the silence
notes: Purge now triggers before the silence

changes.raw_text: The Void: Reverted cleanse logic rework introduced in Patch 10 (CC effects and debuffs are no longer instantly removed, but cleansed in a fixed tick interval)
notes: Reverted cleanse logic rework from Patch 10 — CC effects and debuffs are again cleansed in a fixed tick interval, not instantly

subsections.heading: Bows
subsections.searchable_text: Bows Enchanted Quiver Attack Damage Increase 240% 220% Magic Arrow Warbow Projectile hitbox

changes.raw_text: Enchanted Quiver: Attack Damage Increase: 240% → 220%
Magic Arrow (Warbow): Projectile hitbox increased slightly

subsections.heading: Crossbows
subsections.searchable_text: Crossbows Explosive Bolt Standtime 0.3s 0.2s Projectile Speed 30m/s 40m/s Vicious Barrage Siegebow Damage Percent Max Health Current Health

changes.raw_text: Explosive Bolt: Standtime: 0.3s → 0.2s; Projectile Speed: 30m/s → 40m/s
Vicious Barrage: Damage Percent basis: Max Health → Current Health
notes: Using multiple Siegebows now diminishes each other's damage output

subsections.heading: Maces
subsections.searchable_text: Maces Battle Howl Heavy Mace Cooldown 15s 18s Purge before silence

changes.raw_text: Battle Howl: Cooldown: 15s → 18s; Purge now triggers before the silence
notes: Purge now triggers before the silence

subsections.heading: Swords
subsections.searchable_text: Swords Iron Will Energy Cost 9 flat 10% Max Energy Parry Strike Cooldown 18s 16s

changes.raw_text: Iron Will: Energy Cost: 9 (flat) → 10% (of Max Energy)
Parry Strike: Cooldown: 18s → 16s

subsections.heading: Quarterstaffs
subsections.searchable_text: Quarterstaffs Fatal Blade Black Monk Staff Slow removed Breaks shields

changes.raw_text: Fatal Blade: Removed the Slow. Breaks any shields every time it deals damage.
notes: Breaks any shields every time it deals damage

subsections.heading: Spears
subsections.searchable_text: Spears Impaler Hit Delay 0.4s 0.3s Standtime 0.8s 0.65s Spear Throw Heron Spear Projectile Hitbox close targets behind caster

changes.raw_text: Impaler: Hit Delay: 0.4s → 0.3s; Standtime: 0.8s → 0.65s
Spear Throw: Adjusted Projectile Hitbox, making it less likely to hit close targets behind caster
notes: Adjusted Projectile Hitbox — less likely to hit close targets behind the caster

subsections.heading: Helmets
subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Block Soldier Helmet Channel Duration 1.75s 2.5s Electric Discharge Judicator Helmet Diminishing Returns Retaliate Hunter Hood Buff Duration 4s 3s Stone Skin Plate Helmets Cooldown 45s 30s Buff Duration 7s 4s

changes.raw_text: Block: Channel Duration: 1.75s → 2.5s
Electric Discharge (Judicator Helmet): Fixed bug where it triggered higher Diminishing Returns than intended
notes: Fixed bug where it triggered higher Diminishing Returns than intended

changes.raw_text: Retaliate: Buff Duration: 4s → 3s
Stone Skin: Cooldown: 45s → 30s; Buff Duration: 7s → 4s

subsections.heading: Armors
subsections.searchable_text: Armors Life Steal Aura Hellion Jacket lifesteal Mobs 50% players unchanged

changes.raw_text: Life Steal Aura: Now steals only 50% of the damage dealt to Mobs (Lifesteal vs. players unchanged)
notes: Now steals only 50% of the damage dealt to Mobs; Lifesteal vs. players unchanged

subsections.heading: Shoes
subsections.searchable_text: Shoes Crush Charge Duskweaver Boots Cooldown 20s 25s Dodge all Boots 25s 20s Energetic Sprint Cloth Sandals Energy per Tick 5 4 Total 20 16 Rejuvenating Sprint Plate Boots Heal per Tick 18 14.4 Total 72 57.6

changes.raw_text: Crush Charge: Cooldown: 20s → 25s
Dodge: Cooldown: 25s → 20s
Energetic Sprint: Energy per Tick: 5 → 4 (Total Energy: 20 → 16)
Rejuvenating Sprint: Heal per Tick: 18 → 14.4 (Total Heal: 72 → 57.6)

subsections.heading: Battlemount Abilities
subsections.searchable_text: Battlemount Crystal Beam Roving Bastion Damage Reduction Debuff 12% 15% Damage 120 24

changes.raw_text: Crystal Beam: Damage Reduction Debuff: 12% → 15%; Damage: 120 → 24

subsections.heading: Miscellaneous
subsections.searchable_text: Miscellaneous Cooldown Spell Change 10s 5s Equipment Change 10s Toggle abilities cancel 0.5s 0.75s Channel 0.3s 0.75s

changes.raw_text: Cooldown on Spell Change: 10s → 5s (Cooldown on Equipment Change remains 10s)
Toggle abilities minimum duration before cancel: 0.5s → 0.75s
Channel abilities minimum duration before cancel: 0.3s → 0.75s

subsections.heading: Knightfall Abbey
subsections.searchable_text: Knightfall Abbey Blessing of Compassion 1 Stack Heal 14% 10% Heal over time 7% 5% Instant Heal scaling 1% Heal over time 0.5% 0.25%

changes.raw_text: Blessing of Compassion: 1 Stack Heal: 14% → 10%; 1 Stack Heal over time: 7% → 5%; Instant Heal scaling per stack: 1% (unchanged); Heal over time scaling per stack: 0.5% → 0.25%

sections.heading: General Fixes
items: Fixed issue where Login UI disappeared if user accepted Close Application prompt
Fixed issue where opening world map and clicking a zone while inside Knightfall Abbey would show the Knightfall Abbey map
Mounts of dismounted players no longer show in overcrowded regions
Fixed Guild Season winner banner animation
Crystal League / Arena: Fixed issue where final point rotation of claimed orbs did not count toward final score
Slow effect of Malicious Imp autoattack no longer triggers Diminishing Returns
[Mobile] Fixed issue where spells could not be interrupted by releasing joystick and moving in same direction as when starting cast
Additional graphical, UI, terrain, audio, animation, and localization fixes
sections.searchable_text: Fixes Login UI Close Application Knightfall Abbey world map zone Mounts overcrowded Guild Season banner Crystal League Arena final point Malicious Imp Diminishing Returns Mobile joystick graphical UI terrain audio animation localization
